gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade Gradle wrapper distribution URL from version 7.1 to 8.11.1 to support Java 21 compilation and execution.
gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties.why_exists: Gradle 7.1 does not support Java 21 as a target or runtime; the build will fail to compile or run on JDK 21 without upgrading the wrapper.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java source and target version from 11 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 21 if the source/target version is not updated to 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Adopt Spring Boot 3.4.0 parent POM to manage dependency versions and build configuration for the new framework version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and has different dependency management; using the old manual dependency management or old parent will cause version conflicts or missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire and Failsafe plugins to version 3.5.2 to support Java 21 and modern test execution.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Surefire/Failsafe (2.22.2) may not fully support Java 21 module system or test discovery.
